hero.lead: GezFly unites instant global connectivity, your personal AI travel desk, and curated stays and experiences in one seamless flow.
hero.micro: 180 countries · active in seconds · no hidden fees

pass.title: GezFly · first-class card
pass.desk: Travel desk: your private transfer and lounge access at Haneda are ready. Shall I confirm?

statement: Others sell tickets. GezFly runs the journey — from connection to door, in one careful flow.

services.title: Begins with connection, covers the rest of the trip.
services.lead: eSIM is the core; stays, experiences and flights fall into the same flow, on your assistant's recommendation.
services.esimD: Instant data in 180 countries. Set up in minutes with a QR.
services.stayD: Curated hotels, at the best prices.
services.expD: Tours and activities, on your assistant's tip.
services.flightD: Find your route, catch the best fare.

concierge.title: Beside you, always on.
concierge.lead: The AI assistant that comes with your eSIM knows your destination, replies in your language and suggests the best option at the right moment — before you ask.
concierge.me: I land in Tokyo tomorrow, any plan for the evening?
concierge.ai1: Your private transfer from Haneda is set. I've prepared two options around Shibuya for the evening.
concierge.offerD: 18 min from your hotel · instant confirmation

auth.title: Join in seconds.
auth.lead: Sign in with Google or Apple in one tap; all your trips, cards and assistant history in one place.
auth.cardSub: Let the journey remember with you.
auth.note: By continuing you accept the Terms and Privacy policy. Your account syncs across devices.

steps.title: On your way in three steps.
steps.s1D: Pick your eSIM for the destination, scan the QR, get online.
steps.s2D: Tell your assistant where you're going; routes and tips arrive ready.
steps.s3D: Arrange stays, transfers and experiences in one flow.

cta.title: Let your next journey be a class above.
cta.lead: Pick your eSIM, bring your personal travel desk. GezFly handles the rest.

desk.head: GezFly Assistant
desk.greeting: Hi! Where are you headed? eSIM, hotels or a plan — I can help with all of it.

footer.tagline: From connection to door, in one flow. Travel a class above.
